body.style: Clean, highly readable sans-serif to contrast the classic headers

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use large padding (p-8 to p-24) to let the catalog breathe.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Use Mode A 'Tetris' Grid for the Featured Catalog section to avoid boring identical cards.
spacing_and_layout.corners: Minimal rounding. Use rounded-sm or sharp edges for a classic paper/book feel.

components.header: Crystal Glass effect (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F6F0]/80) with a 1px bottom border of #D4AF37/30. Logo in center (Cormorant Garamond, text-3xl).
components.product_card: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-[#EFE9DF]), no shadow by default. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle warm shadow (shadow-xl shadow-[#722F37]/5).
components.buttons: Primary CTA: bg-[#722F37] text-white hover:bg-[#5a252b] rounded-sm. Secondary: border border-[#1A1A1A] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-white rounded-sm.
components.marquee: Editorial Ribbon style. Serif font, pale background (#EFE9DF), dark text (#1A1A1A), large gap (gap-32), slow drift. Used for Author Names or Categories.

animations.hover: Smooth transform and opacity transitions. (transition-all duration-300 ease-out)
animations.page_scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling recommended for a premium momentum feel.

image_urls.description: Curated stack of international books and news on a wooden table
Ornate library shelves, use with heavy cream overlay
Audiobook player interface on antique desk

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the landing page layouts to achieve the bento grid and classic asymmetry. Do not overuse Shadcn Cards.
Use Shadcn UI for interactive elements (shopping cart, checkout, dropdowns) but style them with minimal border-radius and the custom color palette.
Ensure all fonts are imported correctly (Cormorant Garamond for headings, Manrope for body).
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (e.g. data-testid='add-to-cart-button').
For the hero section, use a split layout or bento grid, avoiding generic center-aligned text.
Integrate standard mock flows for the checkout process (Razorpay/Cashfree UI).
Run linting on JS files after implementation.
Maintain the warm, classic editorial aesthetic throughout the app, prioritizing typography and whitespace.
